description_long: This is a vintage-style chest of drawers with a distressed, light wood finish and ornate carved detailing on the front. The front features two large doors with symmetrical, swirling carved patterns and vertical handles, flanked by decorative twisted columns. The top and sides are flat and bordered with subtle carved edges, while the feet are short and slightly ornate, elevating the piece. The back is plain and unfinished, indicating it is meant to be placed against a wall. The overall appearance suggests a sturdy, solid wood construction with a rustic, antique aesthetic suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban settings.
description: A vintage, distressed light wood chest of drawers with ornate carved front doors and decorative columns, standing on short feet.
description_view_0: Front view showing two carved doors with swirling patterns, vertical handles, and decorative twisted columns on each side.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a flat, bordered panel with subtle wood grain and no visible handles or decoration.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain, unfinished wooden back panel with no decorative features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing a flat, bordered panel with visible wood texture.
